probe_alternatives.tactic: move=> z; inline*; sp; if; auto; smt(dBlock_uffu size_ge0).
probe_alternatives.how_to_use: The read-only probe failed before EasyCrypt could validate this tactic. Do not treat this as evidence that the tactic is invalid; retry after the backend is healthy or choose a commit only if the proof route is otherwise clear.

facts_and_diagnostics.fact_note: Only current-frontier facts are shown here; the full proof context artifact keeps the compiler/internal details.

notes.message: Current residual goal mentions unfoldable definition(s): pi, p. Use `rewrite /NAME` before SMT when those predicates block simplification; these names are not smt(...) lemma hints.
proof-state analysis sees no live call sites after a prior `inline *` at tactic 12. Continue at procedure/ambient layer, or undo if a call lemma is needed.

obligation_families.effect: The current proof point is dominated by local logical obligations rather than program-frontier movement.
obligation_families.limitations: Quantifier names are not normalized across EasyCrypt pretty-printer variants.

translation_facts: Decorations identify the program memory from which a term is read.
Pretty-printer memory names and introduced proof-context names can differ.
ambient_memory_translation.effect: Local claims in the pure tail depend on the currently introduced memory binders as well as displayed term decorations.

pure_tail_surface.effect: Summarizes verifier-visible pure-goal structure after program frontier actions have been discharged or hidden by local proof steps.
limitations: This panel records syntactic and proof-state facts from the current view.
It does not choose a tactic or instantiate a lemma.

items.label: Before call invariant #6
items.committed_tactic: call (_: DoubleQuery.bad, ={DoubleQuery.qs} /\ (DoubleQuery.bad{1} <=> DoubleQuery.bad{2}) /\ fdom PRFi.m{1} = DoubleQuery.qs{1}, DoubleQuery.bad{1} <=> DoubleQuery.bad{2}).
items.why_checkpoint: call invariant introduction point; later oracle/branch obligations often reveal missing preserved facts or an over-strong equality from this tactic

reference.note: Panels collapsed for focus. The essentials for THIS phase are in the focus above; the rest were noise here (a flat view of all of them is what disorients). If you genuinely need a precise field from one, ask with `inspect_context`.

surface_profile.name: l4_checked_action_surface
surface_profile.description: L4 Verifier-Checked Action Surface: exposes checked previews, post-probe goals, route health, recovery diagnosis, recovery signals, and selected diagnostics while demoting accepted partial openers that only create residual surgery.
